title: Palantir (PLTR)Intrinsic Value
description: We ran a full discounted cash flow on Palantir using FY2025 actuals. One number. Every assumption disclosed. Here's what PLTR is really worth.

fcfGrowth.title: FCF Growth Rate (Y1-Y5)
fcfGrowth.rationale:
" data-astro-cid-4eecoce3>
Palantir saw 56% revenue growth in FY2025, but assuming >50% growth for five years is extremely risky. We peg FCF growth at 25%, assuming high AIP adoption in commercial offsets slowing government growth, while low capex lets cash flow drop straight to the bottom line.

verdictFooter: Based on FY2025 actuals. Data via S&P Global (Mar 18, 2026).
